item.title: Children's Tower Stools Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury and Death from Entrapment and Fall Hazards; Imported by AMZCMJ DGD
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from February 2025 through March 2026 for between $85 and $100.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from February 2025 through March 2026 for between $85 and $100.
item.summary: This recall involves AMZCMJ DGD-branded children's tower stools. The wooden kitchen stools measure about 15 inches deep, 22 inches wide and 34 inches tall. They are foldable and convert into a table and a chair and have a blackboard. The brand name is printed on the product's order receipt.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: AMZCMJ DGD Children's Tower Stools.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled tower stools immediately and contact AMZCMJ DGD for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to destroy the stool by writing "recalled" in permanent marker on all sides, disassembling it and sending a photo of the destroyed stool to dgdtoddlertowerrecall@dchskj.cn. Consumers should then dispose of the destroyed product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
